name: monitor_edit
description: Edit an existing monitor's settings including URL, friendly name, monitoring interval, and alert contacts.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the monitor to edit.

parameters.name: friendly_name
parameters.description: Updated display name for the monitor.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Updated URL or IP to monitor.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Set to 0 to pause or 1 to resume.

parameters.name: alert_contacts
parameters.description: Updated alert contact IDs and thresholds.
